bulletsEn: Anthropic's new "Capybara" tier, rumored to be above Opus, shows significantly improved performance in coding, academic reasoning, and cybersecurity, as corroborated by Fortune and leaked posts. This advanced model, potentially a ~10T parameter class, signifies Anthropic's aggressive scaling ambitions in the frontier AI space. Its rollout is reportedly constrained by high

Google launched Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a new realtime model for voice and vision agents, emphasizing lower latency and improved function calling. This model boasts 2x longer conversation memory in Gemini Live, supports 70 languages, and includes watermarking of generated audio via SynthID. Third-party benchmarks indicate a "thinking level" tradeoff, with higher reasoning achieving 95.9% Big Bench Audio at 2.98s TTFA.

Mistral AI released Voxtral TTS, an open-weight text-to-speech model designed for production voice agents, featuring 9-language support and low latency. This 3B/4B-class model achieves approximately 90 ms time-to-first-audio and shows favorable comparisons to ElevenLabs in preference tests. Its open-weight nature and strong performance metrics make it a significant entry in the speech synthesis market

ARC-AGI-3 launched as a new benchmark for general agentic reasoning, featuring puzzle/game-like environments where humans achieve 100% success while frontier models score under 1%. The benchmark aims to measure zero-preparation generalization and human-like learning efficiency, sparking immediate controversy over its efficiency-based scoring protocol which heavily penalizes extra steps

items.summaryKo: AI 트위터 요약 섹션은 해당 날짜에 트

items.title: MiniMax 2.7: GLM-5 at 1/3 cost SOTA Open Model

bulletsEn: The OmniCoder-9B and Qwen 3.5 9B models are gaining attention for their impressive performance, often compared to much larger models despite their smaller size. These models demonstrate significant potential for local deployment on consumer hardware, offering an alternative to cloud-based solutions with increasing quota restrictions.

Anthropic launched interactive charts and diagrams in chat, demonstrating a clear move towards richer frontends for LLMs beyond simple text. This innovation allows for more dynamic and visual interactions, enhancing the overall user experience and utility of AI models. It signifies a broader trend in AI development focusing on multimodal outputs and interactive interfaces.
